verse.name: v1
verse.lines: In and out of situations That tug – a – war at me All day long I struggle For answers that I need. Then I come into His presence All my questions become clear And for a sacred moment No doubt can interfere.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: In the presence of Jehovah God Almighty Prince of Peace Troubles vanish hearts are mended In the presence of the King

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Through His love The Lord provided A place for us to rest A place to find the answers In hour of distress. There is never any reason To give up in despair Just slip away and breathe His name He will come and meet you there.
